How We Work

A system, not just advice

Understand
Identify
Plan
Execute
Review
🎧

Understand Your Current Situation

We start by listening: income, liabilities, goals, and existing commitments. No assumptions, no templates. Every client's situation is unique and we treat it that way.

🔍

Identify Gaps & Opportunities

We map what's working, what's missing, and where your money could be structured better across loans, investments, and coverage. A full-picture audit, not a sales pitch.

📋

Build a Structured Plan

A clear, practical roadmap, not jargon-heavy reports. Every recommendation is explained before anything is executed. You stay in control at every step.

⚡

Execute Across Products

We handle the process end-to-end: applications, documentation, coordination so you don't have to chase anyone. One advisor, one point of contact.

🎯

Review & Adjust Over Time

Financial life changes. We revisit your plan regularly and adjust as your goals, income, or circumstances evolve. This is a long-term relationship, not a one-time transaction.

💼

Why Igris Capital

How we're different

🧭

Advice Before Products

We understand your situation fully before suggesting anything. No quotas, no pressure, no agenda.

🔗

End-to-End Coordination

Loans, investments, and insurance handled under one roof - with a single advisor who understands your full picture.

📅

Long-Term Commitment

We're not here for a transaction. We're here to grow alongside you through every stage of your financial life.

Start Here

Not sure where to begin?

Most people come to us overwhelmed - too many products, too much noise, too little clarity. That's exactly the problem we solve.

A 20-minute conversation is all it takes to get a clear view of where you stand and what your next step should be.

No obligation. No paperwork. Just clarity.

What to expect in your first call

We'll ask about your income, current loans, savings, and what you're trying to achieve. Based on that, we'll outline a structured approach - loans, investments, or insurance - with clear next steps.

No pressure. No commitments.
Take the First Step

Ready to bring clarity to your finances?

A free, no-obligation 20-minute consultation with Joy Mendonsa, your dedicated financial advisor.

About Igris Capital

Built on clarity and trust

A Mumbai-based financial advisory firm helping individuals and families structure their financial lives with clarity, purpose, and long-term thinking.

Our Story

Igris Capital was founded with a simple belief: most people don't need more financial products - they need better financial clarity.

In a market flooded with agents chasing quotas, we chose a different path - building a firm where every recommendation starts with a question, not a product pitch.

We work with a limited number of clients deliberately, because quality of advice demands depth of relationship. We are not building volume. We are building trust.

"Most financial decisions go wrong not because of bad math, but because of unclear priorities."

Problems We Solve
😕
Confused about which mutual fund to pick or where to start investing
📞
Overwhelmed by agents pushing products without understanding your needs
🔗
Managing loans, insurance, and investments with different people and no coordination
⏳
Delaying financial decisions because nothing feels clear or trustworthy
💡
Needing a single, honest advisor who understands your full financial picture
Our Philosophy

Advisors, not salespeople

We don't lead with products. We lead with questions about your goals, your situation, your timeline. Only then do we recommend.

In a market full of agents pushing quotas, we've chosen to be advisors building relationships. Every client gets honest, jargon-free explanations before anything is executed.

"Good financial decisions start with clarity, not confidence."

— Joy Mendonsa, Founder
Advice-First Approach

We understand fully before we recommend anything. No pressure, no agenda.

Clear Explanations - No Jargon

Every product explained in plain language you can act on confidently.

Practical Execution Support

We don't just advise and step back. We handle the process end-to-end with you.

Long-Term Planning Mindset

We're here for the next decade of your financial life, not just the next transaction.

Our Commitment

What we stand for

🏛️

All Needs, One Roof

Every financial need coordinated by one trusted firm.

🤝

Truly Personalized

We understand your full picture before recommending anything.

⚡

Fast Execution

From documentation to disbursement - we move with precision.

📅

Long-Term Relationship

We track and support your journey through every life stage.

💬

No Jargon, Ever

Every recommendation explained clearly before any execution.

🔗

Structured System

Every service is part of a broader financial architecture for you.

Meet the Founder

The person behind Igris Capital

Joy Mendonsa
Founder & Financial Advisor
📍 Mira Bhayandar, Mumbai · Maharashtra
His Story

Joy founded Igris Capital with a single conviction: financial advice should start with understanding, not with selling. With experience across mutual fund distribution, insurance planning, and loan structuring, Joy brings a rare ability to see the full financial picture and communicate it plainly.

In a market flooded with agents chasing quotas, Joy chose a different path: building a firm where every recommendation starts with a question, not a product pitch. Every client advisory relationship is led personally by Joy, with no outsourcing, no call centres, no bots.

"I started Igris Capital because I believed clients deserved an advisor who asks before they answer."

— Joy Mendonsa

Legal

Terms & Conditions

Last updated: January 2026

Welcome to Igris Capital. By accessing or using our website and services, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. Please read them carefully before proceeding.

1. About Igris Capital

Igris Capital is a financial advisory and distribution services firm based in Mumbai, Maharashtra, India. We are registered as an AMFI Mutual Fund Distributor (ARN-356525, EUIN: E680309) and operate as a Point of Sales Person (POSP) for both Life and Non-Life Insurance products under applicable IRDAI regulations. Igris Capital is also a registered MSME (UDYAM-MH-33-0636264) and holds a Shop Act (Gumasta) registration (ID: 103111522603).

2. Services Offered

Igris Capital provides the following services:

  • Mutual Fund Distribution and SIP planning (as an AMFI registered ARN holder)
  • Insurance product distribution (Life and Non-Life) as a POSP
  • Loan facilitation and credit advisory (as a DSA/referral partner with licensed NBFCs and banks)
  • General financial advisory and planning guidance

3. Nature of Advice

Information provided on this website and in consultations is for general educational and informational purposes only. It does not constitute personalized investment advice, tax advice, or legal counsel. Igris Capital is not a registered Investment Advisor (IA) under SEBI (Investment Advisers) Regulations, 2013.

All mutual fund investments are subject to market risks. Clients are advised to read all scheme-related documents carefully before investing.

4. User Responsibilities

  • Provide accurate and complete information when seeking our services
  • Conduct your own due diligence before making any financial decision
  • Not misuse this website or attempt to gain unauthorized access to any system
  • Comply with all applicable laws and regulations in your jurisdiction

5. Intellectual Property

All content on this website, including text, logos, graphics, and the Igris Capital brand, is the intellectual property of Igris Capital. Unauthorized reproduction, distribution, or use is strictly prohibited.

6. Third-Party Links

Our website may contain links to third-party websites (such as mutual fund AMCs, insurance companies, or lenders). Igris Capital is not responsible for the content, accuracy, or privacy practices of any third-party sites. Visiting such links is at your own risk.

7. Limitation of Liability

Igris Capital shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential losses arising from reliance on information on this website or from investment decisions made by clients. Past performance of any product is not indicative of future returns.

8. Amendments

Igris Capital reserves the right to update these Terms and Conditions at any time without prior notice. Continued use of the website constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

9. Governing Law

These terms are governed by the laws of India. Any disputes arising shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of courts in Mumbai, Maharashtra.

10. Contact

For any questions regarding these terms, please contact us at joy@igriscapital.in or call +91 89287 93627.

← Back
Legal

Privacy Policy

Last updated: January 2026

Igris Capital is committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and safeguard your data when you use our website or engage with our services.

1. Information We Collect

We may collect the following types of information when you interact with Igris Capital:

  • Personal Identification: Name, phone number, email address, date of birth
  • Financial Information: Income details, loan requirements, investment goals shared voluntarily for advisory purposes
  • Communication Data: Messages sent via our contact form, WhatsApp, or email
  • Usage Data: Browser type, pages visited, time spent, collected anonymously for improving user experience

2. How We Use Your Information

  • To respond to your enquiries and provide financial advisory services
  • To process loan applications, mutual fund investments, or insurance through our partner institutions
  • To send relevant updates, service reminders, or important communications (you may opt out at any time)
  • To improve our website and services

3. Data Sharing

We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information. We may share data with:

  • Lending partners (HDFC, ICICI, Axis, Bajaj Finserv) solely for loan processing purposes
  • AMFI-registered AMCs for mutual fund transactions
  • IRDAI-regulated insurance companies for policy issuance
  • Regulatory bodies if required by law

All third-party partners are bound by their own privacy policies and applicable regulations.

4. Data Security

We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data from unauthorized access, disclosure, or loss. However, no method of internet transmission is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

5. Data Retention

We retain your personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfil the purposes outlined in this policy, or as required by applicable law (e.g., KYC and financial transaction records as mandated by SEBI/IRDAI/RBI).

6. Your Rights

  • Right to access: Request a copy of the personal data we hold about you
  • Right to correction: Request correction of inaccurate data
  • Right to deletion: Request deletion of your data, subject to legal obligations
  • Right to opt out: Unsubscribe from communications at any time

7. Cookies

Our website may use minimal cookies to improve functionality and user experience. No personally identifiable information is stored in cookies.

8. Children's Privacy

Our services are not directed to individuals under 18 years of age. We do not knowingly collect data from minors.

9. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. Any changes will be reflected on this page with an updated date. Continued use of our services constitutes acceptance of the revised policy.

10. Contact Us

For privacy-related queries or to exercise your rights, contact Joy Mendonsa at joy@igriscapital.in or +91 89287 93627.

← Back
Legal

Investment Disclaimer

Last updated: January 2026

Mutual Fund Disclaimer

Mutual fund investments are subject to market risks. Please read all scheme-related documents carefully before investing.

Past performance of a mutual fund scheme does not indicate or guarantee future performance. The NAV of units issued under the scheme can go up or down depending on factors and forces affecting the securities markets.

Igris Capital is registered as an AMFI Mutual Fund Distributor (ARN holder) and earns commission/trail income from AMCs for mutual fund distribution. This constitutes a potential conflict of interest. Clients are advised to seek independent advice if in doubt.

Insurance Disclaimer

Insurance is the subject matter of solicitation. Igris Capital operates as a Point of Sales Person (POSP) for Life and Non-Life Insurance under the IRDAI framework.

  • Tax benefits under the Income Tax Act are subject to change in tax laws
  • Please read the policy document carefully before purchasing
  • Claims are subject to policy terms and conditions

Loan / Credit Disclaimer

Igris Capital facilitates loan applications as a referral/DSA partner with licensed banks and NBFCs. We do not independently lend money. All loans are subject to approval by the respective lending institution based on their credit assessment criteria.

  • Loan approval is not guaranteed
  • Interest rates and terms are determined by the lending institution
  • All EMI calculations shown on this website are indicative only

General Financial Disclaimer

Information on this website is for general informational purposes only and does not constitute financial, investment, tax, or legal advice. Igris Capital is not a SEBI-registered Investment Adviser.

The calculators and tools on this website provide approximate estimations based on user-inputted assumptions. Actual returns will depend on market conditions, specific fund performance, interest rate changes, and other factors beyond our control.

Igris Capital is not liable for any financial losses incurred based on information provided on this website. We strongly recommend consulting with a qualified financial professional before making any investment, insurance, or borrowing decision.

Regulatory Registrations

  • MSME Registered · UDYAM-MH-33-0636264
  • AMFI Registered Mutual Fund Distributor · ARN-356525
  • EUIN · E680309
  • POSP: Life Insurance (IRDAI Compliant)
  • POSP: Non-Life Insurance (IRDAI Compliant)
  • Shop Act (Gumasta) · ID: 103111522603
  • DSA / Referral Partner: HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, Axis Bank, Bajaj Finserv

Contact for Grievances

If you have a grievance related to our services, please contact Joy Mendonsa at joy@igriscapital.in or +91 89287 93627. We are committed to resolving all concerns within 7 working days.
